ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Peter Fetros appearing for executor. Counsel explains the delay in filing. Court wants counsel to file a declaration with his explanations. Matter submitted when the declaration is filed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lois Baty.
